text: Excellent fuel station with consistently good service. The staff is polite, efficient, and attentive, making the whole experience quick and hassle-free. Definitely a dependable stop for refueling. Highly recommended.

station_address: Ground Floor, Dahisar - Mira Rd, Gaurav Tal Patriwala Industrial Area, Dahisar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400068
text: I did fill petrol in my car at this petrol pump. After filling the person gave me his personal gpay to pay the charges. He mentioned he will pay in cash to the outlet. Not sure if it’s a normal practice here but I think otherwise. Hence sharing it here for everyone. Petrol receipt and my Google pay screenshot attached.  @indianoil
